title: luzula campestris subsp. nevadensis
intro: Luzula campestris subsp. nevadensis, also known as Nevada woodrush, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It is a perennial herb with grass-like leaves and purple or red flowers. The medicinal properties of Luzula campestris subsp. nevadensis include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, and it can be prepared through herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions.
